tax: Family within Abolethids defined by the full aboleth body plan and mature psychic enslavement.
ap: They have a broad blunt head, four tentacles near the mouth, lateral fin ridges, a muscular eel-like trunk, and three eyes set for forward and side perception in black water.
eco: They maintain lairs in deep pools, flooded vaults, and warm mineral basins where mucus films can accumulate.
beh: They behave as hidden tyrants, preferring servitor networks, false religions, and altered intermediaries to direct exposure.
traitsText: Traits include long memory, telepathy, mucus aura, aquatic strength, and contemptuous intelligence.
abilities: Abilities include domination, illusion, mucus transformation, memory violation, and lair communication through water.
bg: True Aboleths are the model for identifying lesser abolethid kin in the Throat.
g: True Aboleths are the central abolethid line: large, ancient, aquatic, mucus-skinned dominators with inherited ancestral memory.
